name: Improper Handling of Syntactically Invalid Structure
description: The product does not handle or incorrectly handles input that is not syntactically well-formed with respect to the associated specification. Malformed input can trigger unexpected behavior, crashes, or resource exhaustion when the product assumes valid structure.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (user input, API requests, file uploads) flowing to TRANSFORM or CONTROL nodes (parsers, deserializers, processors) without a CONTROL mediator (syntax validator, schema checker, well-formedness verifier) that rejects syntactically invalid structures before processing.
